summary: Iteration 84: Smart Text Detection and Targeted Editing Feature - All tests passed. Backend detect-image-text endpoint works correctly with Gemini Vision AI. Frontend 3-step UI flow (detecting → select text → input new text) is fully functional.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 404 for invalid UUID pipeline_id (e.g., 'nonexistent'). Should validate UUID format and return proper error.

issues: Some images in SELECT MEDIA grid show gray placeholders initially (lazy loading delay)

action_items: Consider adding UUID validation in edit-image-text endpoint to return 400 for invalid UUID format instead of 500
critical_code_review_comments: Text detection may return empty for images with minimal text - this is expected AI behavior, not a bug
Debug logging added to _detect_texts_in_image function for troubleshooting - consider removing in production
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart text detection feature is working. The detect-image-text endpoint uses Gemini Vision AI which may return empty results for images with minimal/no text - this is expected behavior. The 3-step UI flow in Marketing.jsx (lines 1101-1175) is fully functional: (1) detecting spinner, (2) detected texts as clickable buttons, (3) input for new text with Voltar button. Test image URL that works: https://rzwpuitdsejtmuuabxwh.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/pipeline-assets/single-35b53c76_1_cff264.png

detect-image-text_endpoint.details: Returns texts array and count. Detected 4-8 texts from PAS Framework image including 'Problem', 'Agitate', 'Solution', 'PAS Framework', 'Not Anymore!', 'Mom, the Bible is Boring...'

edit-image-text_original_text_param.details: Endpoint accepts original_text parameter without validation error (422)

frontend_3step_flow.details: Step 1 (detecting spinner), Step 2 (detected texts as buttons), Step 3 (input for new text) all working. Voltar button returns to text selection.
